item.title: Danny Masterson's Legal Battle Explained
item.description: A look at Danny Masterson’s legal battle and the case that led to a 30-year sentence.

media:content.media:title: Danny Masterson's Legal Battle Explained
media:content.media:description: A look at Danny Masterson’s legal battle and the case that led to a 30-year sentence.

item.title: Adnan Syed Released After 23 Years Sparks Debat
item.description:
In 2022, Adnan Syed was released from prison after a judge vacated his conviction in the 1999 killing of Hae Min Lee. He had spent over two decades behind bars while maintaining his innocence, with the case gaining global attention through a popular podcast.
His release followed new evidence and concerns about how the original trial was handled. Prosecutors later dropped charges, but legal challenges continued, and courts later reinstated his conviction on procedural grounds.
In 2025, a judge reduced his sentence to time served, allowing him to remain free despite the conviction remaining in place. The case continues to draw public debate over justice, evidence, and the role of media in criminal cases.

media:content.media:title: Adnan Syed Released After 23 Years Sparks Debat
media:content.media:description:
In 2022, Adnan Syed was released from prison after a judge vacated his conviction in the 1999 killing of Hae Min Lee. He had spent over two decades behind bars while maintaining his innocence, with the case gaining global attention through a popular podcast.
His release followed new evidence and concerns about how the original trial was handled. Prosecutors later dropped charges, but legal challenges continued, and courts later reinstated his conviction on procedural grounds.
In 2025, a judge reduced his sentence to time served, allowing him to remain free despite the conviction remaining in place. The case continues to draw public debate over justice, evidence, and the role of media in criminal cases.

item.title: The Story of Peter Keller
item.description:
In April 2012, authorities in Washington state began searching for Peter Keller after his wife and teenage daughter were found dead in their home near North Bend. Investigators said he set fire to the house before fleeing into nearby wilderness.
After days of searching, law enforcement located a hidden underground bunker Keller had spent years building in a remote forested area. Officers surrounded the site and attempted to make contact during a prolonged standoff.
Following the standoff, authorities entered the bunker and found Keller dead inside. Officials concluded he died from a self inflicted gunshot. The case drew attention due to the elaborate bunker and the timeline leading up to the discovery.

media:content.media:title: The Story of Peter Keller
media:content.media:description:
In April 2012, authorities in Washington state began searching for Peter Keller after his wife and teenage daughter were found dead in their home near North Bend. Investigators said he set fire to the house before fleeing into nearby wilderness.
After days of searching, law enforcement located a hidden underground bunker Keller had spent years building in a remote forested area. Officers surrounded the site and attempted to make contact during a prolonged standoff.
Following the standoff, authorities entered the bunker and found Keller dead inside. Officials concluded he died from a self inflicted gunshot. The case drew attention due to the elaborate bunker and the timeline leading up to the discovery.
